dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5896 IH: Guarding Ratepayers from Imposed EV Charging Directives Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Van Drew introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Public Utility Regulatory Policies Act of 1978 to repeal the standard relating to electric vehicle charging programs, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Guarding Ratepayers from Imposed EV Charging Directives Act or the GRID Act.

section.header: Repeal of standard relating to electric vehicle charging programs

subsection.text: Paragraph (21) of section 111(d) of the Public Utility Regulatory Policies Act of 1978 (16 U.S.C. 2621(d)) is repealed.

paragraph.text: Paragraph (8) of section 112(b) of the Public Utility Regulatory Policies Act of 1978 (16 U.S.C. 2622(b)) is repealed.

Section 112(c) of the Public Utility Regulatory Policies Act of 1978 (16 U.S.C. 2622(c)) is amended by striking In the case of the standard established by paragraph (21) of section 111(d), the reference contained in this subsection to the date of enactment of this Act shall be deemed to be a reference to the date of enactment of that paragraph (21)..
Subsection (h) of section 112 of the Public Utility Regulatory Policies Act of 1978 (16 U.S.C. 2622) is repealed.

Section 124 of the Public Utility Regulatory Policies Act of 1978 (16 U.S.C. 2634) is amended by striking In the case of the standard established by paragraph (21) of section 111(d), the reference contained in this section to the date of enactment of this Act shall be deemed to be a reference to the date of enactment of that paragraph (21)..
